message:
feat(fr-persist): LZF compression on RDB save (br-frankenredis-1uin)

fr-persist::encode_rdb now mirrors upstream's `rdbSaveLzfStringObject`
policy: any string longer than 21 bytes is compressed via a pure-Rust
port of `lzf_c.c::lzf_compress`, and the upstream-compatible LZF
special encoding (0xC3 + clen + ulen + payload) is emitted whenever
the compressed wire form is strictly smaller than the raw form.

* `lzf_compress` (~150 lines): Knuth-multiplicative trigram hash,
  literal-run accumulation up to MAX_LIT=32, backref encoding for
  match lengths 3..MAX_REF=264 with the upstream `len < 7` /
  `len >= 7 + extra-byte` split, MAX_OFF=8192 backward distance
  limit. Returns None when the encoded stream would exceed the
  caller's `out_budget`, mirroring upstream's "fits in `len - 4`"
  signal.
* `rdb_encode_string` only attempts LZF for inputs > 21 bytes
  (avoiding the common case of short keys / AUX values where the
  prefix overhead wipes any savings) and falls back to raw when
  `lzf_size >= raw_size` byte-for-byte.
* `rdb_length_size` helper: returns the number of bytes the
  variable-length RDB length encoder would emit for a given value,
  used by the size comparison.
* 7 new fr-persist unit tests:
  - lzf_compress_round_trips_repetitive_payload (256B, compresses)
  - lzf_compress_round_trips_short_input (5..33 bytes, boundary)
  - lzf_compress_round_trips_long_repetitive_payload (4096B, exercises
    MAX_REF + extra-byte encoding)
  - lzf_compress_returns_none_when_budget_exceeded (incompressible)
  - rdb_encode_string_emits_lzf_for_long_compressible_string
  - rdb_encode_string_emits_raw_for_short_string
  - rdb_encode_string_emits_raw_when_compression_grows_payload
* New conformance test `live_redis_rdb_lzf_save_loads_under_upstream`:
  builds an fr-persist dump.rdb with a 256-byte compressible string
  (verified to contain the 0xC3 marker), spawns vendored redis-server
  pointed at it, asserts the value comes back byte-identical via GET.
  This proves upstream can load our LZF-emitted RDB end-to-end.

Validated via rch: cargo check workspace clean; cargo test -p
fr-persist passes 137/137 (130 prior + 7 new); cargo test -p
fr-conformance --lib passes 188/188 (187 prior + 1 new); cargo clippy
-p fr-persist -p fr-conformance --all-targets -- -D warnings clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
